name: mnemo
description: Markdown-first knowledge memory for AI agents — the vault of .md files is the source of truth, FTS5 is a derived index.

plugins.name: mnemo
plugins.description: Persistent knowledge memory: markdown vault + FTS5 search, a reasoned relation graph (contradiction surfacing), and a CLAUDE.md hot cache. Skills: /mnemo:start, /mnemo:ingest, /mnemo:query, /mnemo:lint.
